steps.title: Compare the formulas
steps.content:
The general kinetic energy formula and the given formula describe the same value of $K$, so their coefficients of $v^2$ must match.
$$\frac{1}{2}mv^2=38v^2$$

steps.title: Solve for the mass
steps.content:
Divide both sides by $v^2$, then multiply by $2$.
$$\frac{1}{2}m=38$$
$$m=76$$
The answer is C.
